/opt/ls_2k0300_env/loongson-gnu-toolchain-8.3-x86_64-loongarch64-linux-gnu-rc1.6/bin/loongarch64-linux-gnu-g++  -O3 -march=loongarch64 -mtune=loongarch64 -fPIC -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wall -pthread -Wno-delete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-placement-new  -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/corridor_graph_test.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/verification/tests/corridor_graph_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corridor_graph_test.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_corridor_graph.cpp.o -o corridor_graph_test  -lpthread -lm
